metadata.description: Private/cross-host marketplace: amir, amir-asana, prisma (PANW internal), litellm.

plugins.name: amir
plugins.description: Portable multi-agent project-execution harness for Cursor: commands, rules, skills, hooks, JSON state, QA loops, and cost control.

plugins.name: amir-asana
plugins.description: Asana connector (MCP, 17 tools) + task skills: priorities, review, standup, triage, create/edit/complete, report sync.

plugins.name: prisma
plugins.description: INTERNAL: Prisma SASE / SCM expertise over a local markdown corpus + live public docs. Do not publish baked references.

plugins.name: litellm
plugins.description: Org LiteLLM proxy: Claude Code session launcher + MCP tools for the proxy API surface.
